title: Old Debug Rendering
description: Brings back the pre 1.21.11 debug renderers.
body:
# *Old Debug Rendering*

This mod brings back the pre 1.21.11 chunk border and hitbox renderers.
![Chunk Borders](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f3a558fbb33cc171299d13d8b7f727477fb12fc9.webp)
![Mob Hitbox](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/df5c698b13ac396965cd47ca1c52b86e3ce1dc6c.png)
[Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) is required. \
Install [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) and [YACL](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl) to access the config menu.
